entry.title: New IDC W9124P20D0002 awarded to CCI UTILITY AND CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: UNSPECIFIED MINOR MILITARY CONSTRUCTION, LABORATORY REVITALIZATION, AND OTHER SUSTAINMENT, RESTORATION, AND MODERNIZATION (SRM) PROJECTS FOR THE USAG-R DPW.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: ARCHITECT AND ENGINEERING- CONSTRUCTION: RESTORATION OF REAL PROPERTY (PUBLIC OR PRIVATE)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: CCI UTILITY AND CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, LLC

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: CCI UTILITY AND CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, LLC

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
